description_long: This hardware store features a rectangular, single-story structure with a prominent blue fascia at the front, displaying the store's name 'Vigo automotgole' in white text. The roof is corrugated and slightly sloped, constructed from gray metal sheets, and the building is surrounded by black and white geometric patterns on the lower facade. The entrance is marked by a wide, open area with striped pavement leading up to the store, suggesting a customer-friendly access point. The side and rear views reveal solid black walls and a continuation of the striped pavement, with no visible windows or secondary entrances. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and clear branding at the front.
description: A modern hardware store with a blue-branded front, corrugated metal roof, and bold black-and-white geometric facade patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue fascia with store signage, wide striped pavement, and main entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the corrugated metal roof and the extended striped pavement, with solid black side walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the geometric black-and-white patterns and the back of the corrugated roof, with no visible entrances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building, striped pavement, and solid black wall.
attribute_storefront_signage: Blue fascia with white text reading 'Vigo automotgole' on the upper front of the building.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a wide, open entrance with striped pavement leading up to it, a blue fascia with signage above, and geometric black-and-white patterns on the lower facade. No windows or display areas are visible.
